info.title: datasources-api
info.description:
# Errors
| Error code | Message | HTTP status code | Payload |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| number | string | 409 |  |

post.summary: Validate a datagraph schema and analyse the relevance of its joins
post.description:
Validate a datagraph schema and analyse the relevance of its joins

Performs two steps:
1. Structural validation of the schema (duplicate tables, unknown relation targets, column constraints, …).
2. For each relation declared in the schema, queries Pinot to measure how well the join keys
overlap between the two datasources (distinct-value intersection score).
The relation analysis is only executed when the schema is structurally valid.
Draft version becomes Live, current Live version becomes inactive, new Draft version is created

get.summary: Get the authorize URL for an OAuth client
Get the authorize URL for a datasource

datasourceIds.description:
This is used when we use AggregationStepType.MERGE or AggregationStepType.COUNT
to refresh the datasource when one of those datasources has been updated
Note: if we have a ingester datasource in dependencies here, the datasource will be updated every day AND if we have
a worker datasource, when this datasource has been updated (effective update only)

refresh.description: This field is the time between each worker run

primaryKey.description:
If the primary key is defined it would be used to de-duplicate rows
with the same value when upserting data

type.description: If there are no primaryKey we assume we must append data

sftpPublicKey.description:
Public key used for SFTP authentification via the ftp server
If the public key is provided, password authentification is disabled

get.summary: Get datasource notification settings for the current company

put.summary: Update datasource notification settings for the current company

post.description:
This controller only proxy to the query service,
see doc on the query service and use his OpenAPI client for types

post.summary: Get available values for a field in a datasource
post.description:
This controller only proxy to the query service,
see doc on the query service and use his OpenAPI client for types

schema.description: Filter on datasources that have on of those ids
Filter on datasources that contains that string in the name
Filter on datasources with on of those resource groups

Filter on datasources with live data (that can be queried).
Note: when using this option, the `status` in datasource will always be `PUBLISHED` or `PAUSED`
Filter on global datasources (no company id nor resource group)
Filter on datasource with one of those statuses

List of fields you want to get, by default the whole datasource with versions is returned.
But you can choose to return only ['name'] to have data: [{ id: 'bar', name: 'foo' }].
Note: `id` is always returned

Filter on datasources with a specific hierarchy path.
Pass an array of strings representing the folder path (e.g., ["Marketing", "Q4"] for Marketing > Q4).
Empty array returns root-level datasources.

get.summary: List available hierarchy values at a specific level
get.description:
Returns distinct hierarchy values at the next level after the given hierarchy path.
Pass no hierarchy to get top-level folder names.
Pass ["Marketing"] to get subfolders under Marketing.
Pass ["Marketing", "Q4"] to get subfolders under Marketing > Q4.

schema.description:
Parent hierarchy path. The endpoint returns children at the next level.
Empty or omitted returns top-level folders.

post.summary: Upload a file for a worker datasource
Promote a worker datasources (run the live job of the current version)

state.description:
The state of the version.
If state=draft, it means this is the draft version, where
updates occurs.
If state=live, it means this is the live version used to render
the content, it won't be updated again

fromFormatted.description:
Use this option to fallback from a field in the formatted entry
If not provided, it will fallback from a value in the raw entry

valuePath.description:
By default the fallback rule, fallback if the currentValue is empty (undefined/null or length=0)
if you provide the `valuePath`, we will use the value at this path instead of the currentValue

exit.description: Use this option to exit if we've fallbacked

datasourceIds.description:
This is used when we use AggregationStepType.MERGE or AggregationStepType.COUNT
to refresh the datasource when one of those datasources has been updated
Note: if we have a ingester datasource in dependencies here, the datasource will be updated every day AND if we have
a worker datasource, when this datasource has been updated (effective update only)

refresh.description: This field is the time between each worker run

primaryKey.description:
If the primary key is defined it would be used to de-duplicate rows
with the same value when upserting data

type.description: If there are no primaryKey we assume we must append data

sftpPublicKey.description:
Public key used for SFTP authentification via the ftp server
If the public key is provided, password authentification is disabled

datasourceIds.description:
This is used when we use AggregationStepType.MERGE or AggregationStepType.COUNT
to refresh the datasource when one of those datasources has been updated
Note: if we have a ingester datasource in dependencies here, the datasource will be updated every day AND if we have
a worker datasource, when this datasource has been updated (effective update only)

refresh.description: This field is the time between each worker run

primaryKey.description:
If the primary key is defined it would be used to de-duplicate rows
with the same value when upserting data

type.description: If there are no primaryKey we assume we must append data

sftpPublicKey.description:
Public key used for SFTP authentification via the ftp server
If the public key is provided, password authentification is disabled

query.description: see WorkerDatasourceVersion.aggregationPipeline MERGE query
